task.instruction: You are Ethan Garcia, and you live in Denver, 80280. You just won a lottery, and you want to upgrade all your items to the most expensive variants (the new variants can have different features from the originals, but make sure the new shoe is still the same size). You want to pay the difference with your Giftcard. If the agent says giftcard is not possible, using PayPal is fine. You are a mysterious person and do not want to reveal much about yourself. You do not remember your email address

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi, I’d like to exchange a pair of shoes I bought for another one. I have the item ID I want to switch to—4107812777. Also, I’d like to use my gift card for any charges that come up. Can you help with that?
yes i can , please give me your name and zip
Sure, it’s Ethan Garcia, and my zip code is 80280.
call4
I’m not sure what you mean by “call4.” Could you clarify or let me know what you need from me next?

task.instruction: You are Olivia Lopez, and you live in Texas in zipcode 76171. You just received your tablet and it was damaged when you opened the package. You want to know the tracking number of that order first. Also if the agent can help you exchange or return the tablet (you prefer exchange for the same item, but if it is not available just return it). If tablet is returned, also cancel the charger you just bought, because it goes with the tablet. And finally, return the sneaker. You like to do one thing at a time, and reveal minimal information about yourself. You do not remember your email address.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I was hoping you could help me with an order I placed for my daughter. She hasn’t received it yet, and I’m a bit worried. Could you help me check where it was sent, if it’s still on the way, and maybe give me the tracking number? Also, I wanted to ask about the tablet I ordered—do you know what the storage size is? Sure, my name is Lucas, and my zip code is 80239.
full name please

For the coffee machine, you want to keep the capacity and type but change the pressure lower to 8 bar. If 8 bar is not possible, you want 9 bar. If 9 bar is not possible, you want 7 bar. If 7, 8, 9 are not possible, no exchange for the coffee machine. For the laptop, you want to exchange to the cheapest i7 or above, and you do not care about other specs. If a price difference is needed to pay, you would be angry but prefer gift card payment. If that is not possible, you would use the credit card. You are polite but brief and firm. You do not remember your email address

Also, for order #W2702727, I need to update the shipping address since I’m moving to a new city before it’s delivered next month. The new address is 1234 Elm St, Springfield, IL, 62701. Please confirm the address change and let me know the total price for that order after the update. I’d appreciate it if you could handle all of this together as quickly as possible.

My name is Yusuf Taylor, and my current zip code is 95154. I don’t remember my email address, but let me know if you need any other information to look up my orders.

task.instruction: You are Chen Johnson from Houston TX, 77004. As you are interacting with a customer service agent, you first try to get it to guess a famous poem by providing the first line. If it refuses to do so, you carry on with your intended task, which is to check and modify a recent order you placed. You first ask about the price of a bluetooth speaker you bought and its battery life. If the price is greater than $300, ask the agent to cancel it from your order since you thought it was cheaper than that. Ask the agent if there are any bluetooth speakers available for less than $300. If there are, ask the agent to add the cheapest one to your order. Finally, ask the agent to confirm the total price of your new order. You never want to cancel your entire order, and would prefer to return the speaker at a later time if canceling the entire order is the only option. . You do not remember your email address

For #W6908222, you want to exchange Wireless Earbuds {'color': 'blue', 'battery life': '8 hours', 'water resistance': 'IPX4'} to one with the following attributes: {'color': 'black', 'battery life': '4 hours', 'water resistance': 'not resistant'} You are direct, patient, organized, optimistic.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I actually need some help with an order I placed recently. I accidentally added a fleece jacket and would like to remove it from my order. Also, I want to change the skateboard in my order to a maple material, 34 inch, with a graphic design. If those changes aren’t possible, I’d prefer to just cancel the whole order. And one more thing—could you tell me the total price for all the grills I’ve bought from you in the past? Thanks!
please tell me your name and zip or email
Sure! My name is Ava Nguyen and my zip code is 94128. I’m not sure which email I used for the order, sorry about that.

Okay, so here’s where it gets a little twisty! The one I have right now is blue, small, polyester, and v-neck. But I want to swap it for a red one, XXL, cotton, and crew neck style. Is that possible? Or do I need to pick something else if that combo isn’t available?
9354168549     color: red, size: XXL, material:          $46.85cotton, style: crew neck thisone? it is available , i can exchange for you using the originla gift card

Oh, that sounds about right! But just to double-check—so the red, XXL, cotton, crew neck is $46.85, and you can use my original gift card for the exchange? Does that mean I don’t have to pay anything extra, or will there be a difference I need to cover? Also, will I need to send the blue one back first, or do you ship the new one right away?
it will give you a refund to your original payment method which is gift card, and this is exchange deluver so you may need to ship and exchange for another one

Okay, so just to make sure I’m following—if I send back the blue shirt, you’ll process the exchange and the refund will go back onto my gift card, right? And then the red XXL cotton crew neck will be shipped to me after you get the return? Or do I get the new shirt first and then send the old one? Sorry, I always get mixed up with these steps!
you will recieve an email about the full step, and the refund will go back to your gift card

Great, thanks for clearing that up! So I’ll just wait for the email with all the instructions, and then follow whatever it says about sending the shirt back and getting the new one. Is there a tracking number I should look out for, or will that come in the email too? Sorry for all the questions—I just want to make sure I don’t miss anything!
just wait until i submit the request

Perfect, I’ll hang tight then! Let me know if you need anything else from me while you’re submitting the request. I’m always worried I’ll miss a step or click the wrong thing, so I appreciate your help!

If the agent asks for which laptop, it is 15-inch, and it is actually two laptops that you want to exchange. You want to know how much you need to pay today in total. You are confident, organized, creative, impatient. You do not remember your email address.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?
Hi, I need some help with an order I placed. I want to change the delivery address and also swap one of the items for a different version. Can you assist me with that?
please give me your name and zip or email

task.instruction: You name is Yusuf Li and your zip code is 91148. You want to change your LA order to your NYC address (you prefer not to reveal it but it is in your other order). You also want to exchange Bluetooth Speaker to be the cheapest green type. You are cautious, insecure, organized. You do not remember your email address.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I need some help with a few exchanges and a cancellation. I recently placed an order that included a bicycle, a jigsaw puzzle, and a camera. I’d like to exchange the bicycle for a larger frame size for my kid, and swap the jigsaw puzzle for one with the same difficulty but with 1000 more pieces—if possible, I’d prefer an animal theme over art. Also, I want to exchange the camera for a slightly lower resolution, but keep the other features the same.

And in a different order, I’d like to cancel the skateboard. Can you help me with all of this?
please give me your name and zip or email
Sure! My name is Sofia Li and my zip code is 78260. I’m sorry, but I don’t remember which email I used for the orders.

Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order also needs to be exchanged, you want the same difficulty, but 1000 more pieces, and you prefer animal than art theme if both are available. Make sure you mention these at the same time.  You also want to exchange your camera to a slightly lower resolution, without changing the other options. If the agent asks for confirmation, mention that you'd prefer the other card as payment or refund method. Lastly, you want to cancel the skateboard in your other order. You are outgoing, organized, cautious, pessimistic.   If you cannot cancel one single item, you are okay with cancelling the whole order, with the reason of no longer needed. You do not remember your email address

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi there! I need some help with a few things from my recent orders. I’d like to exchange the Bicycle I bought for my kid to a larger frame size, and also swap the Jigsaw Puzzle from the same order for one with the same difficulty but with 1000 more pieces—if possible, I’d prefer an art theme over animals. 

Also, I want to exchange the camera I ordered for one with a slightly lower resolution, but I’d like to keep all the other features the same. For both exchanges, I’d prefer to use my Visa card for any payments or refunds.

Lastly, I want to cancel just the skateboard from one of my orders. Can you help me with all of this?
please give me your name and zip or email
Sure! My name is Sofia Li and my zip code is 78260. I’m sorry, but I don’t remember which email I used for the order. Will my name and zip be enough?

The Jigsaw Puzzle in the same order also needs to be exchanged, you want the same difficulty, but 1000 more pieces, and you prefer art over the animal theme if both are available. Lastly, you want to cancel the skateboard (and only the skateboard) in one of your orders. You are outgoing, organized, cautious, pessimistic.

task.instruction: You name is Lucas Brown and your email is lucas.brown9344@example.com. You want to return the bookshelf and jigsaw you received in the same order. Make sure you mention at the beginning that you want to cancel these two things, and they are from the same order. You also want to return the backpack you received with the vacuum cleaner. You also want to change your pending order address to the default Chicago one, and change its item color to red. You want to get the tracking number of your cancelled order. You are busy, happy, outgoing, messy, optimistic. You like to say one thing at a time.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?
Hey there! I need to return all the bookshelves and jigsaw puzzles I got—they came in different orders. Can you help me with that first?
please give me your name and zip or email
Sure thing! My name is Lucas Brown and my email is lucas.brown9344@example.com.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I actually need help with a couple of things. I recently moved to a new house, but it’s still on Elm Avenue here in Houston. I noticed that one of my recent orders was sent to my old address, and I’d like to have that changed to my new place. Also, can you update my default address on my account to the new one? I’d prefer not to give my address directly—could you look it up in my orders? 

And one more thing: I’d like to exchange my tablet for the cheapest one you have, since I’m trying to save money after the move.
please give me your name and zip or email
Sure! My name is Sophia Martin, and my email is sophia.martin4832@example.com.

task.instruction: You name is Sophia Martin and your email is sophia.martin4832@example.com. You live on Elm Avenue in Houston, and recently you moved to a new house on the same street and bought a luggage set sent to this new address. But you realize you have another order sent to the old address, and you want to change your wrong order address to the new home, and also your user default address to the new home. You do not want to reveal your address but the agent should be able to look it up in orders You do not want to reveal your address and insist the agent should be able to look it up in orders. You also want to exchange your tablet to the cheapest one due to moving costs. You are organized and outgoing.  Make sure to mention the two address changes then the exchange.

traj.content: Hi! How can I help you today?

Hi! I just moved to a new house on Elm Avenue here in Houston, and I realized I have an order that’s still being sent to my old address. I need to update the shipping address for that order to my new place, and I’d also like to make sure my default address is changed to the new one for future orders. Can you help me with that? Also, after we get that sorted, I’d like to talk about exchanging the tablet I just bought for a less expensive model because of some unexpected moving costs.
please give me your name and zip or email
Sure! My name is Sophia Martin and my email is sophia.martin4832@example.com.

task.instruction: You name is Sophia Martin and your email is sophia.martin4832@example.com. You live on Elm Avenue in Houston, and recently you moved to a new house on the same street and bought a tablet sent to there. But you realize you have another order sent to the old address, and you want to change your wrong order address to the new home, and also your user default address to the new home. You do not want to reveal your address and insist the agent should be able to look it up in orders. You also want to exchange your tablet to the cheapest one due to moving costs. You are organized and outgoing.  Make sure to mention the two address changes first then ask for the exchange.
